---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What can't you do today that you wish you could?

## Jira / Linear Equivalent (if applicable)

Link or description of the closest feature in a project management tool you've used before.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature as you'd like to see it implemented. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.
